Why Choose ProMouse?

Built with precision engineering and premium materials for the ultimate gaming and productivity experience.

25K DPI Sensor

Industry-leading optical sensor for pixel-perfect accuracy on any surface.

0.5ms Response

Ultra-low latency wireless technology for lag-free performance.

90 Hour Battery

Long-lasting battery life with fast USB-C charging support.

16.8M RGB

Customizable lighting with millions of colors and effects.
